channel.title: Linux commands on Personal Website of Zhizhou
channel.description: Recent content in Linux commands on Personal Website of Zhizhou

item.title: C/C++ Lecture Notes 3
item.description: If Statement if (condition) { sth } // The following codes are equivalent bool isPositive = true; int factor = 0; //some operations may change isPositive's value if(isPositive) factor = 1; else factor = -1; // and factor = isPositive ?
